stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which of these statements about the pitching moment coefficient versus angle of attack lines in the annex is correct?

options.a: Static longitudinal stability is greater at line 3 when compared with line 4 at low and moderate angles of attack.
options.b: The CG position is further aft at line 1 when compared with line 4.
options.c: In its curved part at high angles of attack line 2 illustrates a decreasing static longitudinal stability.
options.d: The CG position is further forward at line 1 when compared with line 4.
